title: Haokai Star Rail Blade
description: This mod add many powerful weapons to the game.
body:
Neoforge 1.21.4的模组由于源码被作者手滑删了，Neoforge 1.21.4可游玩[崩坏之刃Neo重制版](https://modrinth.com/mod/haokai-star-rail-blade-reneo)，它拥有更高的强度    
The mod for Neoforge 1.21.4 was deleted by the author due to a hand slip. Neoforge 1.21.4 allows playability of the remastered version of [Haokai Star Rail Blade ReNeo](https://modrinth.com/mod/haokai-star-rail-blade-reneo), which features higher strength
## 🌏中文介绍
使用MCreator制作

此模组添加了许多强力的武器，除“彩虹”系列神器外，所有武器都以游戏《崩坏·星穹铁道》里的角色作为武器纹理
当前武器有彩虹及彩虹神等
在Neoforge 1.21.4的0.3.5版本中有部分武器添加了专属技能

## 🌏English Description
This mod is made of MCreator

This mod has added many powerful weapons, except for the "Rainbow" series artifact, all weapons use characters from the game "Collapse: Star Dome Railway" as weapon textures
The current weapons include Rainbow and Rainbow God
In version 0.3.5 of Neoforge 1.21.4, some weapons have added exclusive skills
Neoforge 1.21.4 is made using MCreator

This mod has added many powerful weapons, except for the "Rainbow" series artifact, all weapons use characters from the game "Collapse: Star Dome Railway" as weapon textures
The current weapons include Rainbow and Rainbow God
In version 0.3.5 of Neoforge 1.21.4, some weapons have added exclusive skills
